general.telemetryDescription: Sends anonymous install, launch, update, app version, operating system, and CPU architecture data. Conversations, prompts, file paths, and workspace contents are never sent.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Reusable instruction packages shared across supported agents. Conversations keep a versioned snapshot.
skills.importZipHint: Supports one or multiple Skill packages
skills.trustConfirm: Mark skill “{{name}}” as trusted and enable it? Unverified skills may include prompt injection or unsafe instructions.
skills.selectPrompt: Select a skill to view details
skills.agentDefaultsHint: Automatically selected when a new task uses this agent.
skills.none: No enabled skills. Import or enable one in Settings.

market.title: Skill Market
market.description: Browse and install skill packages to extend AI capabilities
market.suspiciousConfirm: Skill “{{name}}” is unscanned or marked suspicious. Continue installing?
market.unsignedConfirm: Skill “{{name}}” is unsigned on SkillHub. Continue installing?
market.localDriftConfirm: Skill “{{name}}” has local file changes. Updating will overwrite them. Continue?

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: Review token usage from FreeBuddy sessions and supported accounts by agent and model.
usage.bridgeUnavailable: Usage statistics are only available in the FreeBuddy desktop app.
usage.loadFailedHint: Try again in a moment or reopen FreeBuddy.
usage.refreshFailedHint: The most recent available totals are still shown.
usage.tokenTrendHint: Overall usage across all tracked clients; independent of Agent filters, with granularity adapted to the selected period.
usage.tokenTrendEmpty: No trend data is available for this period.
usage.tokenTrendAriaLabel: {{bucket}}: {{total}} total tokens, {{input}} input, {{output}} output, and {{cache}} cache. Use the left and right arrow keys to inspect other time buckets.
usage.emptyHint: Complete an agent task and FreeBuddy will associate its local session record with that agent.
usage.emptyLinkedHint: Agent sessions were found, but no token records have matched yet. You can scan again now.
usage.byAgentHint: Compare token usage and overall share for each agent
usage.cursorUnattributedMeta: Account-level usage · not linked to a specific agent
usage.cursorConnectedHint: {{accounts}} account connected; Cursor usage syncs automatically on refresh.
usage.cursorDetectedHint: Cursor Agent was detected. Connect an account to include account-level usage.
usage.cursorCachedHint: Cached Cursor usage is shown; reconnect to continue syncing.
usage.cursorDisconnectedHint: Connect a Cursor account to include its account-level token usage.
usage.cursorDisconnectConfirm: Disconnect Cursor and clear the local Cursor usage cache?
usage.cursorSetupTitle: Get and connect a Cursor Session Token
usage.cursorSetupStepOpen: Open Cursor settings and stay signed in.
usage.cursorSetupStepCopy: In browser developer tools, copy the WorkosCursorSessionToken value.
usage.cursorSetupStepPaste: Paste the token below; FreeBuddy does not store or log it.
usage.cursorTokenHelpTitle: Copy it from your browser cookies
usage.cursorTokenHelpOpenDevtools: Open Cursor settings and sign in, then open Developer Tools → Application (use the top » menu if hidden).
usage.cursorTokenHelpCookies: Choose Storage → Cookies → https://www.cursor.com in the sidebar.
usage.cursorTokenHelpCopy: Copy the cookie Value, not its name.
usage.cursorTokenSecurityHint: The token is only passed to local Tokscale for validation and storage. Treat it like a password.

cursorErrors.invalidToken: The Session Token is invalid or expired. Copy it again and retry.
cursorErrors.invalidAccountName: Account names may only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores, hyphens, or colons.
cursorErrors.loginFailed: Cursor connection failed. Check the network and try again.
cursorErrors.logoutFailed: Cursor could not be disconnected. Try again shortly.

usage.agentShare: Token share for {{agent}} in the selected period
usage.tokenCompositionHint: Input, output, and cache distribution for the selected period
usage.byModelHint: Models with the same name are aggregated across agents and providers
usage.modelShare: Token share for {{model}} in the current scope
usage.crossDetailHint: Inspect usage for each agent and model combination
usage.coverageHint: All-time session attribution coverage, independent of the period filter
usage.ambiguousHint: {{count}} sessions were used by different agents and excluded to prevent double counting.

coverageReasons.session_attribution_unavailable: {{count}} Cursor sessions cannot be attributed precisely; synced account usage appears separately as Cursor (unattributed).
coverageReasons.tokscale_client_unsupported: {{count}} sessions use a CLI that the local usage parser does not support yet.

usage.methodNote: Data is primarily read from local session logs; account-level usage from the Cursor API cache is marked as unattributed and never assigned to a specific agent.

handoff.stopBeforeTransfer: Stop the current run before transferring this conversation
handoff.dialogSubtitle: Hand off "{{title}}" from {{agentName}} to another agent
handoff.previewUnavailable: Brief preview unavailable. You can still transfer.
handoff.previewEmpty: No prior context available from the source conversation.
handoff.referenceDescription: The handoff brief and sanitized history were provided to the new agent automatically
handoff.referenceDescriptionUnavailable: The new agent started automatically, but handoff context could not be generated
handoff.sourceUnavailable: The source conversation no longer exists.
handoff.briefExtractionFailed: Transfer completed but no context was carried over. Tell the new agent manually.
handoff.autoStartFailed: The new conversation was created, but automatic startup failed: {{error}}

chat.enterHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
chat.cwdPlaceholder: /absolute/path (optional; defaults to the default working directory)
chat.heroTitle: Free to do whatever you want
chat.emptyHeroBody: Use this thread for coding tasks, project inspection, and focused fixes.
chat.heroSubtitle: Pick a local agent, give it a working directory, then start coding, inspecting, or reshaping the project.

agentPicker.checkingHint: Available agents will appear here when checks finish.
agentPicker.installHint: Install an agent to start a task.

chat.modelPickerHint: Model and related options for this conversation

replay.title: Conversation replay
replay.disabledRunning: Replay is unavailable while the agent is running
replay.disabledWorkflowActive: Replay is unavailable while the team workflow needs attention

starter.one: Analyze the current project structure and suggest next steps
starter.two: Check recent changes for UI/UX issues
starter.three: Implement a small feature and explain how to verify it

analyze.label: Analyze project
analyze.prompt: Analyze the current project structure and tell me what I can do first

modify.label: Edit code
modify.prompt: Modify code based on my needs and provide verification steps

review.label: Code review
review.prompt: Review the risks, issues, and improvements in the current changes

workspace.sendToStart: Send a message to start a run
workspace.codexUsageUnavailable: Codex usage is unavailable right now.

errors.attachmentLimit: Add at most {{count}} attachments per message.
errors.attachmentTooLarge: {{name}} exceeds the 50 MB attachment size limit.
errors.attachmentType: {{name}} is not a supported attachment type.
errors.attachmentDesktopOnly: Attachments require the Electron desktop app.
errors.cliBridgeUnavailable: FreeBuddy CLI bridge is unavailable. Please run the Electron desktop app.
errors.agentNotInstalled: {{agent}} is not installed. Open Settings → Cli Agents to install.
errors.agentFailed: Agent run failed with exit code {{code}}.{{detail}}
errors.rawLogCollapsed: Raw CLI log collapsed for easier debugging.
errors.cliNoStructured: The CLI returned no parseable structured content.

action.externalDirectory: Access a directory outside the workspace

authentication.title: Choose how to sign in to {{agent}}
authentication.description: This agent supports multiple authentication methods. Select one to continue the current task after sign-in.
authentication.terminalDescription: Complete {{method}} in the terminal below. The agent will restart automatically after sign-in.

cli.title: Cli Agents
cli.description: Configure the local cli agents available in FreeBuddy.
cli.name: Name

byok.title: API Key
byok.description: Choose whether this agent uses the default setup or injects your own model service when it starts.
byok.baseUrlHintCodex: For example, https://api.openai.com/v1 or an OpenAI-compatible proxy.
byok.baseUrlHintClaude: For example, https://api.anthropic.com or an Anthropic-compatible proxy.
byok.modelsHint: Add multiple model IDs and switch between them from the conversation model picker.
byok.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste a key to save or replace
byok.newKeyHint: The plaintext key will not be shown again after saving.
byok.savedKeyHint: Saved {{preview}}; leave blank to keep the current key.
byok.hint: The key is stored only on this device and injected when this agent starts.

cli.installNoOutput: No output captured. The installer may have been blocked by Windows execution policy or antivirus.
cli.installVerifiedSuccess: Installed and verified successfully. The agent is ready to use.
cli.installVerifying: Installation completed. Verifying that the agent can run…
cli.installVerificationFailed: Installation completed, but the agent is not usable yet: {{reason}}
cli.installToolMissing: Required install tool {{tool}} was not found. Install Node.js/npm or fix the desktop app PATH.
cli.installTimedOut: Installation timed out. Check the network and try again.
cli.nodeArchitectureMismatch: This Apple Silicon Mac is using an x64 Node.js runtime. Install ARM64 Node.js and try again.
cli.claudeArchitectureMismatch: The ClaudeCode runtime architecture does not match this Mac. Use ARM64 Node.js on Apple Silicon and reinstall.
cli.claudeNativeMissing: The platform-native ClaudeCode executable is missing. Reinstall with npm optional dependencies enabled.
cli.checkTimedOut: The version check timed out. Retry or check whether security software blocked the executable.
cli.unavailable: Agent management is unavailable. Run the desktop app to manage local agents.
cli.installBackgroundHint: Installation continues in the background. Close this panel and keep using FreeBuddy.

scheduledTasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduledTasks.description: Run any prompt with a selected agent on a one-time or recurring schedule.
scheduledTasks.promptToggle: Expand or collapse the task prompt
scheduledTasks.editorDescription: Choose an agent, write the task prompt, and decide when it should run.
scheduledTasks.name: Task name
scheduledTasks.promptPlaceholder: Describe the complete task. The agent can use its available tools and resources when it runs.
scheduledTasks.modelUnavailable: This agent did not provide selectable models.
scheduledTasks.workingDirectoryHint: The agent reads and writes files in this folder. Leave it empty to use the default directory.

executionHint.new_conversation: Each run starts independently, which works well for reports, checks, and recurring summaries.
executionHint.continuous: Results stay in one conversation and the previous result is supplied as context for the next run.

scheduledTasks.runningNote: Uses local time. Missed tasks run when FreeBuddy next opens.
scheduledTasks.emptyDescription: Create one to let an agent handle a task automatically at the right time.

errors.absoluteWorkingDirectory: The working directory must be an absolute path.
errors.invalidRunTime: Run time must use the HH:mm format.
errors.validRunDateRequired: A valid run date is required.
errors.invalidMonthDay: The day of month must be between 1 and 31.
errors.oneTimeMustBeFuture: The one-time task must be scheduled in the future.
errors.taskNotFound: The scheduled task was not found.
errors.appClosed: FreeBuddy closed before the task completed.

workflow.modeHint: Plan with multiple agents, then run as a workflow
workflow.approvalCardBody: Approve the plan above to continue. Need changes? Request changes, then send feedback in the composer.
workflow.requestChangesPlaceholder: Describe what should change in the plan...
workflow.requestChangesFailed: Could not request changes for this workflow.

stepTitles.verify-changes: Verify changes and report unresolved issues

roleDescriptions.planner: Analyzes goals, maps out implementation steps, and defines verification plans.
roleDescriptions.implementer: Writes and updates code files to implement the specified requirements.
roleDescriptions.reviewer: Conducts code reviews to evaluate design, quality, and logic correctness.
roleDescriptions.verifier: Runs validation checks and tests to confirm changes behave as expected.
roleDescriptions.summarizer: Aggregates the workflow outcomes, review comments, and remaining issues.

workflow.teamExecutionHint: Run a coordinated team of agents for your task
workflow.teamBuiltinLocked: Built-in templates keep their workflow structure read-only. Role agents and models can be changed.
workflow.nodeConfigHint: Choose the delivery nodes for this custom team. Implement is always required.

nodeContract.plan: Agent prepares the work plan before edits.
nodeContract.approval: Approve the plan before file writes.
nodeContract.implement: Agent is allowed to edit files.
nodeContract.review: Agent reviews the change and emits REVIEW_STATUS.
nodeContract.verify: Agent runs checks and emits UNRESOLVED.
nodeContract.summarize: Agent writes the final handoff summary.

team-delivery-example.name: Standard Delivery Team
team-delivery-example.description: Standard configurable-node delivery workflow: plan approval, implementation, review, verification, and summary.

team-quick-implement.name: Quick Implementation
team-quick-implement.description: Plan, implement, verify, summarize. Small focused changes with one approval gate before writing.

team-implement-review-loop.name: Build Review Team
team-implement-review-loop.description: Implement, review, verify, and summarize. Review or verification failures loop back to implementation until PASS or max loops.

team-root-cause-analysis.name: Root Cause Analysis
team-root-cause-analysis.description: Collect evidence, challenge the hypothesis, verify the root cause, and produce a concise investigation report.

team-research-report.name: Research Report
team-research-report.description: Research a non-coding topic, analyze scenarios, and produce a concise report with conclusions and confidence.

updater.autoCheckHint: FreeBuddy checks for updates automatically on startup and downloads them in the background.
updater.unavailable: Update checks require the desktop build.

infoCards.settingsDescription: Configure RSS, Ashare-powered A-share quotes, and sports event cards in the third column.
infoCards.rssDescription: Manage RSS feeds and aggregate news articles that you follow in one place.
infoCards.marketDescription: Track A-share market indices and stock details, with custom stock pickers.
infoCards.sportsDescription: Track NBA and live sports scores, schedules, and select match dates.

ashare.symbolHint: Search by security name or six-digit code; the exchange is resolved automatically. Add up to 10 indices, stocks, or ETFs.
ashare.searchError: Search is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
ashare.noSearchResults: No supported Shanghai or Shenzhen securities found.

infoCards.sportsProviderHint: Always fetches NBA scores with no API key, including regular games and Summer League. Shows up to 10 games with live scores first.
infoCards.needsConfiguration: This card is not configured yet. Choose its content in Settings.
infoCards.sourceError: Source error; showing the last cached result

prompts.market: Analyze this market-index snapshot. State the data time and staleness first, then summarize direction, notable moves, and signals worth monitoring. Do not present this as financial advice.
prompts.sports: Interpret this sports event snapshot. Separate live, upcoming, and completed games, then summarize notable scores and matches. Clearly state when the data is insufficient.

feed.settingsDescription: Manage RSS and Atom subscriptions for quick reading while agents run.
feed.rsshubBaseUrlHelp: Used to resolve rsshub:// routes. Different instances support different sites; switch instances when a route returns 403/503.
feed.rsshubBaseUrlInvalid: RSSHub instance URL must start with http or https.
feed.addSourceHint: Supports standard RSS/Atom feeds and rsshub:// routes.
feed.cardNoSources: Add a feed in Settings to see updates here.
feed.cardNoItems: No feed items yet. Refresh your subscriptions.
feed.interpretPromptIntro: Please interpret this article and extract the key information and possible impact.
feed.interpretPromptOutput:
Please output:
1. A three-sentence summary
2. Key facts and context
3. Possible impact or notable changes
4. Whether the full article is worth reading, and why

draft.title: Preview
draft.loadError: Preview failed to load. Check the entry path or build output.
draft.externalOnlyTitle: Open this page in an external browser
draft.externalOnlyBody: Pages such as WeChat articles and Weibo posts trigger verification or block embedded preview panels. Open it in your browser to read it.
draft.manualFallbackPlaceholder: or enter a URL / README.md / data.json / image.png / file.pdf…
draft.emptyNoWorkspace: No workspace selected. Pick a working directory to preview the agent's output.
draft.emptyNoEntry: No preview yet. Ask the agent to start a dev server, create a page, write a Markdown doc, or generate an image, then it will open here automatically.
